DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: VALERIE A. KRAML, ESQ., 925.838.2090, FOR PLAINTIFF 700 ILLINOIS STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION.
ERIK C. TOFFT, ESQ., 916.367.7098, FOR DEFENDANTS TIPCO CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND BESTCO LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT TIPCO CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled in its entirety. Regarding the first cause of action, Plaintiff has pled that that Civil Code section 895 et seq. applies. This is sufficient. Defendants should proceed with discovery. Regarding the second and third causes of action, the Court cannot determine from the face of the complaint that these causes of action are barred, and Plaintiff is entitled to plead in the alternative. The eighth cause of action is sufficiently pled. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
